description: Synthetic example corpus for the ranker-quality bench. Each entry has a PR-style title, an optional dev-query form, and a list of truth files the fix touched. Supply your own corpus in this shape to run the bench against a real repo.

prs.title: Login button misaligned on mobile viewport
Cart total incorrect when applying percentage coupon to taxed items
Notifications are not cleared from client state after logout
CSV export truncates fields longer than 255 characters
Dashboard loads slowly when a workspace has more than 1000 projects
prs.query: dashboard load slow workspace large projects pagination
